heading: Authority to make grants to address public safety and methamphetamine manufacturing, sale, and use in hot spots
label: 10661 Authority to make grants to address public safety and methamphetamine manufacturing, sale, and use in hot spots

children.heading: Purpose and program authority1So in original. No subsec. (b) has been enacted.1
children.label: a Purpose and program authority1So in original. No subsec. (b) has been enacted.1
A
children.text: to carry out programs to address the manufacture, sale, and use of methamphetamine drugs; and

children.label: B
children.text: to improve the ability of State, territorial, Tribal, and local government institutions of to carry out such programs.2So in original. The word “of” probably should not appear.2

children.heading: Grant authorization
children.label: 2 Grant authorization
children.text: The Attorney General, through the Bureau of Justice Assistance in the Office of Justice Programs may make grants to States, territories, and Indian tribes to address the manufacture, sale, and use of methamphetamine to enhance public safety.

children.heading: Grant projects to address methamphetamine manufacture sale and use
children.label: 3 Grant projects to address methamphetamine manufacture sale and use
A
children.text: investigate, arrest and prosecute individuals violating laws related to the use, manufacture, or sale of methamphetamine;

children.label: B
children.text: reimburse the Drug Enforcement Administration for expenses related to the clean up of methamphetamine clandestine labs;

children.label: C
children.text: support State, Tribal, and local health department and environmental agency services deployed to address methamphetamine; and

children.label: D
children.text: procure equipment, technology, or support systems, or pay for resources, if the applicant for such a grant demonstrates to the satisfaction of the Attorney General that expenditures for such purposes would result in the reduction in the use, sale, and manufacture of methamphetamine.
